summary: Iteration 205 testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend features verified. Abyss UX system working - hub shows only 6 active satellites (mood, mixer, map, breathing, meditation, theory) with 7 dormant. Long-press on central orb reveals dormant satellites as glimmering dots inside orb. Weather Ribbon displays live NWS weather data (Freezing Fog 30.2°F 100% humidity, fair seeing). ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE opens on short orb click. Satellite clicks navigate correctly.

OrbitalHub.js: Short click on orb opens ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 205 Abyss UX, NWS Weather, and Weather Ribbon features fully working. (1) Backend: GET /api/hub/preferences returns active_satellites list (defaults: mood, mixer, map, breathing, meditation, theory). POST /api/hub/preferences updates list. GET /api/weather/current returns weather with temperature_f, description, category, frequency (base_hz, type, reverb, character), seeing_quality. Weather uses NWS API (api.weather.gov) with fallback. (2) Frontend: /hub shows only active satellites (6 by default). Central orb shows 'X dormant' count. Long-press (>500ms) on orb opens Abyss showing dormant satellites as glimmering dots inside orb. Short click opens ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE. WeatherRibbon (data-testid='weather-ribbon') shows temp, description, humidity, seeing quality at top of hub. Satellite clicks navigate correctly. (3) Backend regression: GET /api/observatory/planets, GET /api/mastery/tier, GET /api/workshop/platonic-solids all pass.
